title: taraxacum lepidum
intro: Taraxacum lepidum, also known as the smooth dandelion or lepidote dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, Taraxacum. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum lepidum lie in its roots, leaves, and flowers, which contain bioactive compounds such as taraxasterol, sesquiterpene lactones, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of consuming Taraxacum lepidum include its potential to support liver function, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum lepidum include teas, infusions, and capsules, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
